description: Style NoteA wardrobe essential, a belt is a must-have accessory for the well-dressed male. wrangler has perfected this traditional accessory's foray into modern wardrobes using classic techniques and innovative designs. Wear this piece with jeans, casual shoes and a colourful tee or shirt. Product DetailsBrownish black belt made of leather Tang clasp for a snug FitHoles to customise fitFixed loop near the buckle to hold belt in place Material and CareLeatherWipe surface with a clean, dry cloth to remove dustDo not store in sunlight
